layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (MODE A) for Marketing/Portfolios, asymmetry prioritized

components.buttons: rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-sm
components.cards: bg-[#F4F0EA] rounded-2xl p-6 border border-[#E8E3DD] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

sections.name: Header
sections.description: Sticky navigation with glassmorphism, Logo on left, Links in middle, WhatsApp CTA on right. Mobile hamburger.

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Full-width background image with bg-black/40 overlay. Center aligned text with a bold serif H1, elegant taglines, and a WhatsApp CTA button. High contrast.

sections.name: Featured Destinations
sections.description: Bento grid layout showcasing Bali, Switzerland, Maldives, Dubai, Paris, Kerala, Kashmir, Rajasthan. Use negative space and varying card sizes. Images cover the card with a bottom gradient and text.

sections.name: Services
sections.description: Generously spaced list/grid of services (Custom Itineraries, Group Tours, Luxury Travel, Visa Assistance). Minimalist icons. Warm earthy backgrounds.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.description: A scrollable or grid section with user portraits, serif quotes, and 5-star ratings.

sections.name: CTA Section
sections.description: A dedicated block with earthy background, encouraging users to book via WhatsApp or phone call.

sections.name: Footer
sections.description: Large footer block with generous padding (py-32). Brand name in large display font, links, contact info.

hero.description: Luxury travel resort sunset for Hero section background

instructions_to_main_agent: Use custom Tailwind classes instead of plain Shadcn. It is a marketing page.
Ensure all fonts are imported appropriately (e.g., Cormorant Garamond and Outfit via Google Fonts).
DO NOT use a contact form. Only use CTA buttons with WhatsApp/Phone icons and text.
WhatsApp buttons should have the brand CTA color, likely WhatsApp Green (#25D366) or match the theme's CTA color (#128C7E).
Ensure the hero image overlay is not too dark (use bg-black/40 or bg-black/30), so the resort image is visible and elegant.
Follow the bento grid protocol (MODE A) for Featured Destinations with asymmetrical layout (mix of tall, wide, and square image cards).
Images for destinations must not exceed 80vh on mobile to prevent blocking scroll.
For interactive elements, implement 'data-testid' for all buttons, links, etc.
Implement smooth scrolling using lenis or pure CSS (scroll-behavior: smooth).
Ensure generous spacing: p-8, p-12, py-24, py-32 for sections.
Use @lucide/react or @phosphor-icons/react for icons if needed.
Include a sticky WhatsApp button on the bottom right of the page for prominent access.
